label: Sinai Syriac NF M 11, Overtext (Estrangela, Melkite)

note: Palimpsest throughout with underwriting in Christian Palestinian Aramaic

bib.citation: Philothée du Sinaï, Nouveaux manuscrits syriaques du Sinaï. Athens, 2008
Géhin, Paul. Les manuscrits syriaques de parchemin du Sinaï et leurs membra disjecta, CSCO 665. Louvain: Peeters, 2017

program.label: NEH Syriac Parchment Descriptions Grant
program.description: Catalogued as part of UCLA Library's "Identification and Description of the Syriac and Arabic Manuscripts at St. Catherine’s Monastery of the Sinai, Phase 1: Syriac Parchment Manuscripts" project (2022-2025), funded by the National Endowment for the Humanities. Principle cataloguers were Grigory Kessel (Lead cataloguer), Natalia Smelova (Associate cataloguer), and Vevian Zaki (Cataloguer for Arabic content in Syriac manuscripts).

program.label: Sinai Palimpsests Project
program.description: Imaged and studied as part of the Sinai Palimpsests Project (2011–2016), a collaboration between St. Catherine’s Monastery of the Sinai, the Early Manuscripts Electronic Library, and UCLA Library, funded by the Arcadia Fund and the Ahmanson Foundation. The project used multispectral imaging and scholarly analysis to recover and document erased and obscured texts in palimpsest manuscripts from the monastery’s collection.
